title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
originalTitle: 青春ブタ野郎はゆめみる少女の夢を見ない
posterAlt: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.
synopsis: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl is a 2019 animation, romance and drama film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
